component.name: CLAI
component.summary: Desktop multi-agent orchestration app with MCP-native tools

description.p: CLAI is a desktop application for building, running, and supervising small teams of AI agents. Work is organized into workspaces, each an ongoing conversation with a main agent that can chat with you, use tools through attached MCP servers and a local filesystem and shell sandbox, delegate to helper agents, persist context as memories and artifacts, and run on a schedule.

A Fleet view supervises everything, surfacing scheduled workspaces, tasks that need attention, and live chat previews. CLAI supports multiple providers — OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic-compatible APIs as well as local CLI agents such as Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and OpenCode — with per-agent filesystem and shell execution policies, run notices for policy denials, and fully inspectable task transcripts.

screenshot.caption: Main workspace with agent chat and orchestration tools

description.p: Multiple providers support, npm vulnerability fixes, and formatting cleanup.
Agent memory system, web search/fetch tools, run boundary markers, and Fleet chat input.
